channel.title: Projects on K-Flag
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on K-Flag

item.title: Page - Turn your computer into a home server
item.description: GitHub: Page-Android page-python Summary Clean UI Built on Android with Java Leverages Architecture Components: Room: Storage of defined models with the ability to serve live data. This keeps the application reactive and consistent without the need to manually update UI components when data changes. LiveData: The above-mentioned realtime nature of the application is made possible mainly because of LiveData in conjunction with Room. LiveData keeps datastreams up-to-date and allows propagation of changes through multiple layers.

item.title: Herl - An application to create short links with dynamic destinations
item.description: Live At herl.me Summary Backend built with Go and MongoDB Frontend built with HTML, CSS, JS and Bootstrap Authentication and analytics built with Firebase SSL/TLS certificate provided by Let’s Encrypt Hosted on Google Cloud Platform’s Compute Engine offering on the basic instance. Goroutines allow concurrent handling of large numbers of client requests simultaneously. This coupled with Go’s speed result in a monster of a server. Mongo’s interface to Go allow easy interaction with the database.
